title: The Dead Man Paper
summary: Ada discovers a Potter document dated after his official death, turning scholarship into pursuit.

narrative.newInfo: Potter's disappearance was likely managed, not accidental.
narrative.dripHook: Who suppressed Potter, and who still monitors this knowledge?
narrative.payoffDelivered: Act II closes with a named target and active trajectory.
narrative.notes: Cadence: act-end spike. Function: reveal with consequence. Exit: mission state begins (find Potter).

rewardTokens.description: Posthumous Potter document reframes the whole investigation.
Suppression pattern becomes explicit, not speculative.
